title: More stuff
body:
This mod adds more items, like rainbow tools, and a new dimension!


<details>
<summary>new features</summary>

1. auto smelting pickaxe 
2. a new rainbow ore, used to craft new tools
3. new OP dimension (gives you 20 xp every second you walk on the grass there (made by building a nether portal, but with the rainbow ore, and a smelted rainbow potion))
4. a new structure on top of the nether roof
5. new OP ores
6. new nether biome (burnt rainbow biome(the rainbow biome in the new dimension, but burnt))
7. new player mobs
8. and some more things!
</details>

Reccomended to use [roughly enough items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) with this mod so you know what to craft!

made with mcreator


I have archived this, as I lost the project files when switching linux distros. you can make a continuation of this.
